changesProposed.name: Fervo Energy

verified.name: Fervo Energy
verified.description: A geothermal company based in Houston, Texas that generates electricity through enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) using horizontal drilling techniques. The company operates Project Red in Nevada and is developing Cape Station in Utah.
verified.notes: Wikipedia source (index 2) lists company as 'Private' but website newsroom and IPO-related articles from May 2026 indicate public status. IPO details (date, valuation, amount raised at IPO) cannot be verified from provided sources as Canary Media article title references IPO milestone but content not fully provided.

changesProposed.name: PLD Space

current.name: PLD Space
current.founder: Raúl Torres, Raúl Verdú, José Enrique Martínez

verified.name: PLD Space
verified.description: Spanish company developing partially-reusable launch vehicles called Miura 1 and Miura 5. Miura 1 is a suborbital sounding rocket; Miura 5 is designed to deliver up to 900 kg of payload to low Earth orbit.
verified.notes: Source [1] is about Mars Express dust devils and is not relevant to PLD Space. Database entry claims €350M+ total raised and SPAC stage, but Wikipedia only confirms €120M raised as of June 1, 2024. Series C and venture debt funding mentioned in database entry are not found in provided sources. Miura 1 successfully launched October 7, 2023 per Wikipedia.

changesProposed.name: Scale AI

verified.name: Scale AI
verified.description: An artificial intelligence infrastructure and software company that provides high-quality training data, RLHF services, LLM evaluations, and full-stack AI systems for enterprises and governments. The company powers frontier AI models and deploys AI applications for military and commercial use cases.
verified.notes: In June 2025, Meta Platforms acquired a 49% non-voting stake in Scale AI for approximately $14.8 billion. Founder Alexandr Wang left to join Meta and was replaced as CEO by Jason Droege. Wikipedia indicates Meta owns 49% as of 2025. The database entry's $15.9B total_raised figure cannot be verified from these sources.

changesProposed.name: SpaceX

verified.name: SpaceX
verified.description: American spaceflight, telecommunications, and artificial intelligence company founded by Elon Musk in 2002. SpaceX conducts more orbital launches annually than any other launch provider and operates the Starlink satellite internet constellation.
verified.notes: IPO occurred on June 12, 2026, raising $86 billion. Wikipedia source indicates valuation of $2.6T post-IPO (from TechCrunch). Current database entry claims IPO at $1.5T valuation and $800B pre-IPO valuation, both contradicted by sources. Alphabet Inc. holds 6% equity per Wikipedia.
